productDisplayName: Global Desi Women Printed Green Tunic
description: CompositionGreen printed strappy tunic made of 100% cotton, has lace detailing on the straps, woven tape detailing on the torso and necklineFitRegularWash careDry clean for the first two washes and hand wash in mild detergent thereafterWarm ironTrue to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints on modern cuts with slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western tunic blends cuts, colour, embellishments and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, shalwar, patialas or even leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
